## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Deepgram and Growth X to discuss content strategy, blog posts, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [3 new blog posts ready for review; 5 more coming next week](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Content audit ongoing: \~30 articles to refresh, \~20 to prune](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Language pages project: wireframes expected next week, focusing on speech-to-text first](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [AI apps section needs separate review/pruning process](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Review and Publication

  - [3 new blog posts ready for review in Slack chat and Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Jose to review by Wednesday next week](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [New publishing cadence: review within a week, publish immediately after](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [5 more blog posts coming next week, focusing on top-of-funnel voice AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Flexible content calendar allows for easy shuffling of non-announcement content](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### Content Audit Progress

  - [\~30 articles tagged for refresh, \~20 for pruning](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - Refresh criteria: \<5% traffic decline in 6 months, any MQLs generated, related to core products
  - [Some idiom-related content likely to be pruned](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Audit currently focused on 'learn' pages; AI apps section needs separate treatment](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

### Language Pages Project

  - [Speech-to-text pages for 36 languages prioritized](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Text-to-speech expansion (8 languages) to be included but not immediate priority](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Discussing whether to create separate pages for language dialects or combine them](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Need input on code snippet languages to support (curl, Python, JavaScript, .NET, Go)](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Wireframes expected next week, likely end of the week](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

### AI Apps Section Review

  - [Separate process needed to review and potentially prune non-voice-related AI apps](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Consider adding new voice-related AI apps to flesh out the section](https://fathom.video/share/9pQsRtVWR2Qb5VR3xbFzxDfXXznzmpCS?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)
